## Quality Checklist
- [ ] `dotnet build` — 0 warnings, 0 errors
- [ ] Premium at rest (not only on hover)
- [ ] All states: default, hover, active, focus-visible, disabled, loading
- [ ] Zero raw Tailwind colors — semantic tokens only
- [ ] `focus-visible:ring-2` (not outline)
- [ ] `active:scale-[0.98]` on interactive elements
- [ ] RTL: logical properties (`ms-*`, `me-*`, `start-*`, `end-*`)
- [ ] Light + dark mode via tokens
- [ ] Added to Components.razor showcase
- [ ] Added to ApiReference.razor props table
- [ ] Synced to GlazeUI.Components RCL
